instruction: Write a FreeMarker template defining a macro `renderBadge` that accepts `label` and optional `tone` (default "neutral"). Output a span with classes `badge` and `badge-{tone}`. Escape the label.
code: <#-- Macro: renderBadge(label, tone="neutral") --> <#macro renderBadge label tone="neutral"> ${label?html} <#-- Usage example --> <@renderBadge label="Draft" tone="warning" />
